news_items.headline: White Sox @ Jays Game Thread
news_items.summary: We have an early game. Maybe it will be finished before the start of the World Cup game. Let’s score more than one run today. Yesterday I mentioned the 1-0 games are very rare. That was our first 1-0 game, win or loss, of the season, and they didn’t have a 1-0 game all of […]

news_items.headline: Shohei Ohtani drops out of Dodgers' pitching rotation indefinitely while left knee continues to recover
news_items.summary: Ohtani has been dealing with left knee irritation and recently received a a "lubricant" injection to alleviate the issue.

news_items.headline: Ohtani (left knee soreness) will not pitch Wednesday; return to mound TBD
On Duane Ward’s Passing
news_items.summary: The Blue Jays announced that Duane Ward passed away in Toronto. He was in Toronto for the ceremony for the World Series winning teams, but didn’t get to the ceremony Saturday. They say he died of natural causes. He was just 62. Far too young. We mentioned that it was strange that Tom Henke was […]
